backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the Coal & Curry backend that handles table reservations, newsletter subscriptions, and customer reviews with storage using Map and Set, plus blob storage via a mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three UI contrast/colour fixes applied to Footer.tsx, Navbar.tsx, and MenuTabs.tsx to improve text readability against dark backgrounds.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's pages, components, and public assets.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA with a root div and a module script entry point loading src/main.tsx.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers on all paths except /cart and /checkout, with a reference to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all 9 public routes of coalandcurry.com with lastmod dates, change frequencies, and priority values for SEO crawling.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, CartProvider, and renders the shared Layout (Navbar, Footer, FloatingReserveButton, ChatbotWidget).
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Chat UI panel component for the Agni chatbot that manages message state, renders a scrollable conversation thread, quick-reply buttons, and a text input form.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating action button component that toggles the ChatbotPanel open and closed, fixed to the bottom-right corner of the screen.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: A fullscreen image lightbox modal component with keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons for cycling through an image array.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: A carousel-style testimonials section that displays three reviews at a time, fetching from a backend actor or falling back to static South Indian restaurant reviews.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: The main landing hero section with a full-screen background image, restaurant branding, CTA buttons linking to the menu and reservation pages, and summary stats.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: A decorative Instagram feed grid section displaying six static food/gallery images that link to the restaurant's Instagram profile.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: A promotional section showing three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) with a link to the full offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: A grid section showcasing four signature menu items filtered from menuData, with spice level indicators, veg/non-veg badges, and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: A fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that links to the reservation page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A multi-column site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, menu categories, contact details, and a newsletter signup component.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive fixed navbar for Coal & Curry with scroll-aware styling, active link detection, cart item count badge, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Email newsletter subscription form that calls a mutation hook and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback states.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Menu item card displaying dish image, veg/non-veg badge, signature tag, spice level, price, and an add-to-cart control with quantity increment/decrement.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Sticky horizontal scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, including an 'All Items' option.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Live countdown timer component that ticks every second and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until a target date.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Headless SEO component that imperatively sets document title, meta tags (description, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card), canonical link, and JSON-LD schema via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Cart context providing add, remove, update, and clear operations with localStorage persistence; exposes totalItems and subtotal computed values.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: Language context supporting English and Tamil toggling, with a typed translation lookup function covering all UI string keys.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Alternative cart context (using MenuItem-typed items) with localStorage persistence, quantity management, and cartCount/cartTotal derived values.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exported data arrays for menu items and categories in a South Indian restaurant, including details like price, spice level, vegetarian status, and image paths.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for React, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a custom hook backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching reviews, reservations, and submitting reviews, reservations, and newsletter subscriptions against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for a restaurant-themed design system including saffron, turmeric, and spice color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component for the Coal & Curry restaurant that renders the restaurant's story, chef profiles, and hygiene certifications with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Coal & Curry blog page with a grid of six hardcoded blog post cards covering Chettinad food topics, each with category color badges, metadata, and SEO head tags.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page with item list, quantity controls, remove buttons, and an order summary linking to checkout, using the CartContext for state management.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout flow (order type → details → payment → confirmation) that reads cart state, simulates payment processing, and clears the cart on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page showing restaurant address, phone, email, business hours, social links, a WhatsApp link, and a simple client-side contact form with submission state.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page organized into four themed sections (charcoal cooking, interiors, food photography, celebrations) with a lightbox component supporting prev/next navigation between images.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The Home page assembles the restaurant's landing page with a hero section, features strip, signature dishes, about teaser, customer reviews, and quick-info sections, along with JSON-LD structured data for SEO.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: The Loyalty page displays the Coal & Curry rewards program, showing tier levels (Coal to Inferno), program benefits, and a phone-number enrollment form with basic validation.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: The Menu page renders a searchable, category-filtered grid of 50+ dishes using MenuTabs and DishCard components, pulling data from menuData.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: The Offers page displays six time-limited promotional deals (e.g., Lunch Combo, Family Feast) in a card grid with countdown timers and a hero banner image.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: The Reservation page provides a validated table-booking form with fields for name, phone, date, time, guests, occasion, and seating preference, showing a confirmation screen on successful submission.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a keyword-to-response map and quick-reply labels for the restaurant chatbot, covering topics like menu, timings, reservations, delivery, location, offers, payment, and specific dishes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (saffron, turmeric, deep-red, cream, etc.), fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), border radii, warm/spice box shadows, and accordion/fade-in animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording three completed fix features: updating footer text colors, hamburger menu icon color, and MenuTabs filter tab colors for readability and contrast.
